transcript: For the first time in World Cup history, the two sides who met in the last final walk out side by side for their very first game at the next tournament. There are scores to settle for the Dutch, but for each they hope these will be the first steps on a long road back to the final. There will be complaints but De Vrij makes contact and Spain have a spot kick. Just about onside held his line and Costa looking for the inside ball and he just had that trailing left leg Xabi Alonso is the man to take it Ariane Robben reckons he knows which way he's going Jasper Sillerson is duly informed. Celebrates with his coach. The Dutch have their equaliser. And it comes with a splash of style. Trying to see if they can find a way back into this game. Here come the Dutch again, here comes Robben again. Powering down. Young Matt, wide it goes.
